description_for_human: Personal portfolio and professional profile of Carlos Alberto, Senior Software Engineer and AI Innovation Leader based in Madrid, Spain.
description_for_model: This is the personal website and professional portfolio of Carlos Alberto (calbertts), a Senior Software Engineer with 12+ years of experience specializing in AI systems, cloud architecture, TypeScript, Python, and technical leadership. Currently working at Nationale-Nederlanden (NN Group) in Madrid. Expertise includes LLM fine-tuning, MCP servers, AI agents, serverless architecture, and DevOps. Open to consulting opportunities via The Codigo LLC.
